events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves misreading mark colors for utility locates. Red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm. This is a pure ID item - misreading the standard APWA/CGA color codes. This is non-compliant with 811/CGA best practices. Misreading locate marks could lead to striking utilities, which is dangerous.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (misreading utility marks can lead to striking gas/electric lines)
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Work stage: rough-complete
Percent complete: maybe 60
Confidence: 0.9
